name: property managers handling 10-20 rental units/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 rental units/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate rent roll reconciliation instead of manual spreadsheets and email reports.
problem_solved: manual reconciliation of rent rolls is time-consuming and error-prone.

locked_fields.primary_problem: manual reconciliation of rent rolls is time-consuming and error-prone.
